root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: The time-seeded RNG (`rand.NewSource(time.Now().UnixNano())`) appears in the test code, but this PR is primarily a migration to testify-style testing and does not introduce a concrete targeted stabilization fix or flaky failure signature to classify here.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
